titleStmt.title: SII 17.149: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 149. (A.R. No. 129 of 1904.) TIRUKAṆṬHĒŚVARAM, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the central shrine in the Naṭanapādēśvara temple.
For the same reasons, as stated for the inscription No. 148 above, this inscription also may be assigned to Kulōttuṅga I.

It records the gift of 1(1/2) kāśu by Paḍaiyamuḻāṉ Perumāṉ Kuppai alias Aḻagiyaśōḻan, the Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Vēśālippāḍi and a native of Tiṇaiyambākkam for a sandhi lamp to God Tirukkaṇṇīśvaramuḍaiya Mahādēva of Śoḻakulavallinallūr in Paṭṭāṉpākkai-nāḍu in Gaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . cakkravatti śrīkulot
tuṅkacoḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 4 10 nā
lāvatu kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻavaḷanā
ṭṭup paṭṭāṉpākkaināṭṭu coḻakula
vallinallūr tirukkaṇṇīśvaramuṭaiya ma
hādevaṟkku tiṇaiyampākkattup paṭai
yamuḻān perumān kuppai Āna Aḻakiyacoḻan
vecālippāṭi mūventaveḷāna pakkal Ikko
yilil śivabrāhmaṇan bhāradvāji tiruni
lakaṇṭan tiruvekampammuṭaiyānum Ivan tampi
tirukkaṇṇiśvaramuṭaiyānum Ivan ta
mpi kunikkumpirānum Ivarpakkal koṇ
ṭa kācu Onṟaraiyum Aṟakkoṇṭu sa
ntiviḷakku Oṉṟum Erikkakkaṭavo
m Ivvanaivom santrātittavarai
itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.149 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
